description: Research and compile a list of potential venues in Edinburgh with key details such as location, capacity, and amenities.
success_criterion: List of 3-5 venues with detailed information gathered

description: Select the most suitable venue based on common event criteria (e.g., capacity, location, facilities).
success_criterion: One venue chosen with justification for selection

description: Create a promotional flyer for the selected venue, including venue details, images, and contact information.
success_criterion: Flyer document completed with all necessary elements
